name: Di Renjie

skills.description: Basic atacks add stacks,with each stack granting extra atack speed and movement speed.

skills.name: Respect the Law
skills.description: Flings tokens at a target area in a fan shape,dealing damage.Pasive> After 2 basic atacks,the next gains a random enhancement

skills.name: Legal Immunity
skills.description: Throws tokens to damage nearby enemies.Remove debuffs from yourself and grants brief invincibility

skills.name: Imperial Order
skills.description: Flings a token in the target direction , inflicting damage and stun on the first enemy hero hit and reducing their physical and magical defense
